video_id: The Colours of China - Cinematic Short Film ｜ vivo X200 Pro.mp4.mp3
transcript: I heard tales about this country. A land so unique and diverse, as well as time itself. Where every color, every sound and every moment carries a story. There's an ancient legend here which teaches that life is a delicate balance between five elements each represented by a color. Red Green Yellow White and Black. I don't know. And according to this legend, humans need to find the right balance between these colors, embracing each element's energy, to live in harmony with the world around them. We'll be right back. To be continued... Thank you for watching. To be continued... We'll be right back. Thanks for watching!
